creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Sadly, followup patch does not survived the transmission, it seems. 

There are problems with it anyway: 
- man pages must be listed in Makefile! put MAN1 back and remove it from pkg-plist 
- please don't remove shared locale directories, which are listed in /etc/mtree/BSD.local.dist 

Please fix and resend
